channel.title: news on ngdnhtien
channel.description: Recent content in news on ngdnhtien

item.title: Valerio (CQT) paid a visit to Hung's group
item.description: Prof. Valerio Scarani arrived in Hanoi on 9th October, 2022 following an invitation from our PI, Dr Hung-Quoc Nguyen. We had a nice informal seminar discussing undergoing projects the following day. Below are some memorable moments from the event. Picture 1. Presenting my work. Prof. Valerio did some experimental work with NMR back when he was a postdoc, so we've had somewhat common issues with the overlapping spectra of different subspace transitions.
